purpose: Defines target maturity trajectory from synthetic form to controlled real-use execution across all corridors.
required_questions: What is the source of truth for this claim?
What cap applies if evidence is missing?
What would make this claim fake-green?
pass_criteria: All criteria include owner value, evidence, and PASS/WARN/BLOCK logic.
Current status is explicit per criterion.
No real-use execution claim is made without required evidence.
warn_criteria: Some criteria are still UNKNOWN but improvement hooks exist.
Pilot is preflight-ready only with warnings/caps.
block_criteria: Matrix claims active production capability without evidence.
next_action: Use this matrix in next preflight/pilot closure loop and update criterion statuses with receipts.

criteria.plain_language_meaning: Task-entry corridor is deterministic and resolves from TASK_ID + start task.
criteria.owner_value: Predictable execution entry without long prompts.
criteria.pass_logic: Registered task and current expected task both resolve with complete route/start evidence.
criteria.warn_logic: Resolves only in synthetic fixtures or with known caps.
criteria.block_logic: Resolver cannot deterministically resolve canonical task entry.
criteria.next_improvement_hook: Close remaining resolver caps in first manual Logos registration trial.

criteria.plain_language_meaning: Real-use pilot has explicit preflight gate and reviewers.
criteria.owner_value: No accidental launch without readiness discipline.
criteria.pass_logic: Pilot readiness criteria are measurable and reviewer responsibilities assigned.
criteria.warn_logic: Criteria exist but not all evidence is populated yet.
criteria.block_logic: Pilot readiness has no measurable gate.
criteria.next_improvement_hook: Run first preflight closure without executing real pilot runtime.

criteria.plain_language_meaning: Future domains are preserved as non-active maturity seeds.
criteria.owner_value: Ideas are retained without fake capability claims.
criteria.pass_logic: All seed domains are present and marked CANDIDATE_SEED.
criteria.warn_logic: Seeds exist but some criteria remain UNKNOWN.
criteria.block_logic: Future domains are missing or overclaimed as active.
criteria.next_improvement_hook: Connect each seed to one safe pilot backlog item.
